findings.title: Active refresh sessions survive password-related UPDATE events; zero revoked refresh tokens
findings.codeEvidence: RefreshTokenService.revokeAllForUser not called from changeOrgUserPassword/changePasswordAdmin; AccountService.changePassword only optionally revokes others
findings.impact: Credential change does not terminate existing refresh families; stolen refresh remains valid until 30d expiry
findings.reproduction: Read-only: count refresh_tokens where revoked_at is null; correlate activity_logs UPDATE/RESET events for users
findings.recommendation: On any password change/reset: revokeAllForUser; enforce mustChangePassword; short access TTL
findings.codeFileOrFunction: RefreshTokenService.revokeAllForUser not called from changeOrgUserPassword/changePasswordAdmin; AccountService.changePassword only optionally revokes others

findings.title: All refresh sessions are user-only (no organization/membership binding)
findings.codeEvidence: schema RefreshToken has no organization_id; rotate selects newest ACTIVE membership
findings.impact: Architecture allows refresh from prior org context to mint access for another org when multi-org exists
findings.reproduction: information_schema + refresh_tokens column inventory; sessionUsers classification USER_ONLY_SESSION
findings.recommendation: Bind refresh family to organizationId+membershipId; require explicit org switch for rebind
findings.codeFileOrFunction: schema RefreshToken has no organization_id; rotate selects newest ACTIVE membership

findings.title: Session pile-up: many parallel active families; no rotation/reuse evidence in DB
findings.codeEvidence: Login always creates new family; SPA discards refresh token so logout/rotate unused
findings.dataEvidence: familiesActive=70; usersWithParallelActiveFamilies=2; tokensWithReplacedBy=0; USER_002 activeFamilies=56 USER_001=14
findings.impact: Large attack surface of long-lived refresh secrets; reuse detection never exercised in prod data
findings.reproduction: Group active refresh_tokens by user_id/family
findings.recommendation: Persist and rotate refresh client-side; cap concurrent families; idle revoke
findings.vpsDataEvidence: familiesActive=70; usersWithParallelActiveFamilies=2; tokensWithReplacedBy=0; USER_002 activeFamilies=56 USER_001=14
findings.codeFileOrFunction: Login always creates new family; SPA discards refresh token so logout/rotate unused

findings.title: ORG_001 is single-admin; ORG_002 has zero members/roles
findings.codeEvidence: assertNotLastActiveOrgAdmin only protects MembershipRole.ORG_ADMIN
findings.dataEvidence: adminRisk ORG_001 singleAdminRisk=true activeOrgAdminCount=1; ORG_002 noMembers=true rolesTotal=0
findings.impact: Single point of failure for tenant admin; empty org lacks seeded roles until ensureDefaultRoles runs
findings.reproduction: Count ACTIVE ORG_ADMIN per organization_id
findings.recommendation: Require >=2 admins policy; seed roles on org create; break-glass runbook
findings.vpsDataEvidence: adminRisk ORG_001 singleAdminRisk=true activeOrgAdminCount=1; ORG_002 noMembers=true rolesTotal=0
findings.codeFileOrFunction: assertNotLastActiveOrgAdmin only protects MembershipRole.ORG_ADMIN

findings.title: Active ORG_ADMIN membership has no organization_role_id and empty permissions snapshot
findings.codeEvidence: PermissionsGuard ORG_ADMIN bypass; mapOrgUser shows role without template link
findings.dataEvidence: effectiveAccess MEMBERSHIP_001 roleSource=direct_or_legacy hasPermissionSnapshot=false driftClass=NO_ROLE_LINK; activeMembershipsWithoutRoleLink=1; rolesWithoutAssignments=10
findings.impact: System role templates unused in live auth path; drift tooling cannot compare template vs membership
findings.reproduction: organization_memberships where status=ACTIVE and organization_role_id is null
findings.recommendation: Link admins to org_admin system template on create; store permission snapshot even for ORG_ADMIN for audit
findings.vpsDataEvidence: effectiveAccess MEMBERSHIP_001 roleSource=direct_or_legacy hasPermissionSnapshot=false driftClass=NO_ROLE_LINK; activeMembershipsWithoutRoleLink=1; rolesWithoutAssignments=10
findings.codeFileOrFunction: PermissionsGuard ORG_ADMIN bypass; mapOrgUser shows role without template link

findings.title: MASTER_ADMIN has 14 active refresh families without any organization membership
findings.codeEvidence: OrgScopingGuard bypass for MASTER_ADMIN; refresh tokens user-global
findings.impact: Platform admin sessions accumulate without tenant membership; still user-global refresh surface
findings.reproduction: Users with active refresh and zero ACTIVE memberships
findings.recommendation: Session inventory + revoke controls for platform admins; optional membership binding still N/A
findings.codeFileOrFunction: OrgScopingGuard bypass for MASTER_ADMIN; refresh tokens user-global

findings.title: No invite rows in production — joiner path unused; cannot validate invite integrity empirically
findings.codeEvidence: OrganizationInviteService + plaintext inviteUrl return (Phase 1/2)
findings.impact: Invite security hypotheses remain code-confirmed only; no prod evidence of accept/resend/expiry handling
findings.reproduction: count organization_user_invites
findings.recommendation: When invites used: hash-only delivery, no clipboard plaintext, re-auth for existing users
findings.codeFileOrFunction: OrganizationInviteService + plaintext inviteUrl return (Phase 1/2)

findings.title: Zero ActivityLog rows with metaJson.auditAction despite 89 password-related UPDATE events
findings.codeEvidence: UserAccessAuditService via void record; MASTER_ADMIN password path has no userAudit
findings.impact: IAM-specific audit codes unused in production; forensic reconstruction limited to coarse AUTH_EVENT/UPDATE
findings.reproduction: select count(*) from activity_logs where meta_json ? 'auditAction'
findings.recommendation: Await audit writes; cover master password reset; alert on missing audit after IAM mutations
findings.codeFileOrFunction: UserAccessAuditService via void record; MASTER_ADMIN password path has no userAudit

findings.title: No membership↔role drift pairs — because no memberships linked to roles
findings.codeEvidence: updateRole does not cascade (Phase 3)
findings.dataEvidence: roleMembershipDrift linked rows=0; NO_ROLE_LINK=1; system roles on ORG_001=10 all unassigned
findings.impact: Drift detector idle; privileged drift not observable until templates are assigned
findings.reproduction: Join memberships to organization_roles on organization_role_id
findings.recommendation: Assign templates; add scheduled drift report
findings.vpsDataEvidence: roleMembershipDrift linked rows=0; NO_ROLE_LINK=1; system roles on ORG_001=10 all unassigned
findings.codeFileOrFunction: updateRole does not cascade (Phase 3)

findings.title: No access-review records or jobs found
findings.codeEvidence: No access review model/scheduler in IAM modules (Phase 1/3)
findings.impact: ISO/DSGVO access review control not operational
findings.reproduction: Schema/code search + org coverage field
findings.recommendation: Periodic access review export for admins/privileged memberships
findings.codeFileOrFunction: No access review model/scheduler in IAM modules (Phase 1/3)

findings.title: Invite create/resend returns plaintext inviteToken and inviteUrl to the frontend
findings.codeEvidence: OrganizationInviteService.createInvite/resendInvite return inviteToken+inviteUrl; FE types OrganizationInviteCreatedDto
findings.dataEvidence: invitesTotal=0 in VPS — code-confirmed; no empirical accept samples
findings.impact: Invite secret leaves server boundary; browser/network/clipboard exposure; not email-only delivery
findings.reproduction: Read createInvite return and api.organizationInvites.create response type
findings.recommendation: Never return plaintext token to FE; deliver hashed-token link via real mail only; admin sees status not URL
findings.vpsDataEvidence: invitesTotal=0 in VPS — code-confirmed; no empirical accept samples
findings.codeFileOrFunction: OrganizationInviteService.createInvite/resendInvite return inviteToken+inviteUrl; FE types OrganizationInviteCreatedDto

findings.title: Resend auto-copies invite URL to clipboard without step-up
findings.codeEvidence: InvitesTab.tsx and UsersTab.tsx navigator.clipboard.writeText(res.inviteUrl)
findings.impact: Secrets persist on shared clipboards; shoulder-surfing; paste into chat/tickets
findings.reproduction: Trigger resend in Users & Roles UI
findings.recommendation: Remove auto-clipboard; email-only; require step-up if emergency reveal ever needed
findings.codeFileOrFunction: InvitesTab.tsx and UsersTab.tsx navigator.clipboard.writeText(res.inviteUrl)

findings.title: Transactional mail is log-fallback and debug-logs full inviteUrl
findings.codeEvidence: TransactionalMailService.sendOrganizationInvite returns sent:false fallback; logger.debug body includes inviteUrl
findings.dataEvidence: Phase1 runtime SMTP unset / invite mail fallback
findings.impact: Invites not reliably delivered; secrets may enter application logs
findings.reproduction: Call sendOrganizationInvite without provider; inspect log shape (no prod log dump to git)
findings.recommendation: Wire production mail provider; never log URL/token; redact in log pipelines
findings.vpsDataEvidence: Phase1 runtime SMTP unset / invite mail fallback
findings.codeFileOrFunction: TransactionalMailService.sendOrganizationInvite returns sent:false fallback; logger.debug body includes inviteUrl

findings.title: Existing-user invite accept is public token-only; no login or re-authentication
findings.codeEvidence: acceptInvite: if user exists password not required; AuthGuard bypass on /invites/accept; can reactivate REMOVED membership
findings.impact: Stolen invite link grants/reactivates org membership for existing identity without proving control of that account session
findings.reproduction: Public POST /api/v1/invites/accept with token for existing email — no Authorization header
findings.recommendation: Require authenticated session matching invite email + recent re-auth; show org/role confirm UI
findings.codeFileOrFunction: acceptInvite: if user exists password not required; AuthGuard bypass on /invites/accept; can reactivate REMOVED membership

findings.title: ORG_ADMIN / high-risk invites have no extra accept confirmation MFA or step-up
findings.codeEvidence: createInvite requires manage for ORG_ADMIN but acceptInvite has no elevated checks; audit INFO
findings.impact: Privilege escalation to tenant admin via invite token theft
findings.reproduction: Create ORG_ADMIN invite; accept via public endpoint
findings.recommendation: Shorter TTL; email-only; step-up on create/resend; dual confirm on accept; CRITICAL audit + notify admins
findings.codeFileOrFunction: createInvite requires manage for ORG_ADMIN but acceptInvite has no elevated checks; audit INFO

findings.title: Org admin can set global User.passwordHash directly; no reset token; no session revoke; multi-org unsafe
findings.codeEvidence: UsersService.changeOrgUserPassword updates passwordHash+mustChangePassword; no revokeAllForUser
findings.dataEvidence: Phase4: refreshTokensRevoked=0; passwordEventsObserved=89 with surviving sessions
findings.impact: Org A admin changes credential used for all orgs; attackers with old refresh keep access
findings.reproduction: POST .../users/:userId/change-password; observe user.passwordHash change and active refresh count
findings.recommendation: Target policy: admin requests reset → short-lived single-use token → user sets password → revoke sessions → audit+notify; forbid direct hash set except break-glass
findings.vpsDataEvidence: Phase4: refreshTokensRevoked=0; passwordEventsObserved=89 with surviving sessions
findings.codeFileOrFunction: UsersService.changeOrgUserPassword updates passwordHash+mustChangePassword; no revokeAllForUser

findings.title: Target password-reset policy defined in audit but not implemented
findings.codeEvidence: No PasswordResetToken model/routes; LoginPage forgot-password is support stub
findings.impact: Production relies on direct admin password entry and unenforced mustChangePassword
findings.reproduction: Schema search PasswordReset; LoginPage forgot handler
findings.recommendation: Implement documented target policy in remediation; do not implement in this audit phase
findings.codeFileOrFunction: No PasswordResetToken model/routes; LoginPage forgot-password is support stub

findings.title: No MFA enrollment and no step-up / recent-auth framework for privileged IAM actions
findings.codeEvidence: AccountService security twoFactor*/passkeys* false; JWT claims lack amr/aal/auth_time; users/roles controllers permission-only
findings.impact: Stolen session JWT can perform password reset role assign remove invite reveal without re-auth
findings.reproduction: Inspect account.service security DTO and users.controller privileged routes
findings.recommendation: Ship step-up before or with MFA; require for matrix actions in iam-mfa-step-up-matrix
findings.codeFileOrFunction: AccountService security twoFactor*/passkeys* false; JWT claims lack amr/aal/auth_time; users/roles controllers permission-only

findings.title: Leaver/mover paths do not revoke sessions; no central deprovisioning service
findings.codeEvidence: removeOrgUser sets REMOVED only; suspend sets global User.status; assignRole/updateOrgUser no RefreshTokenService calls
findings.dataEvidence: Phase4 refreshTokensRevoked=0; active sessions survive password events
findings.impact: Removed/suspended/downgraded users retain refresh until expiry; access JWT role claims stale
findings.reproduction: Code path review + Phase4 session integrity CSV
findings.recommendation: DeprovisioningService: revoke sessions revoke invites reassign ownership await audit
findings.vpsDataEvidence: Phase4 refreshTokensRevoked=0; active sessions survive password events
findings.codeFileOrFunction: removeOrgUser sets REMOVED only; suspend sets global User.status; assignRole/updateOrgUser no RefreshTokenService calls

findings.title: Org suspend mutates global User.status instead of membership.status=SUSPENDED
findings.codeEvidence: updateOrgUser dto.status SUSPENDED → UserStatus.SUSPENDED
findings.impact: Tenant-local suspend locks user out of all organizations
findings.reproduction: PATCH org user status SUSPENDED; observe users.status
findings.recommendation: Membership-scoped suspend; optional global lock only for platform/compromise
findings.codeFileOrFunction: updateOrgUser dto.status SUSPENDED → UserStatus.SUSPENDED

findings.title: No access-review campaigns reviewers attestation export reminders or escalation
findings.codeEvidence: No AccessReview model/scheduler; Phase4 coverage accessReviewsFound=0
findings.impact: ISO-oriented periodic access certification not operable; privileged access unreviewed
findings.reproduction: Schema/code search + VPS coverage field
findings.recommendation: Minimum model in iam-access-review-readiness CSV; quarterly all / monthly privileged; depends on EffectiveAccess RM
findings.codeFileOrFunction: No AccessReview model/scheduler; Phase4 coverage accessReviewsFound=0

findings.title: Access reviews blocked by missing EffectiveAccess read-model implementation
findings.codeEvidence: Phase3 canonical RM documented only; runtime uses membership snapshot + ORG_ADMIN bypass + FE localStorage
findings.impact: Reviewers cannot attest a single source of truth for permissions/stations
findings.reproduction: Compare Phase3 rule map vs absence of EffectiveAccess service
findings.recommendation: Implement EffectiveAccessReadModel before access-review UI
findings.codeFileOrFunction: Phase3 canonical RM documented only; runtime uses membership snapshot + ORG_ADMIN bypass + FE localStorage

findings.title: Invite URL points to /accept-invite but no SPA route exists
findings.codeEvidence: buildInviteUrl uses /accept-invite?token=; frontend/src has no AcceptInvite route
findings.impact: Joiner UX broken; token may linger in bookmarks/history if page added later without hygiene
findings.reproduction: Ripgrep accept-invite in frontend/src
findings.recommendation: Ship accept-invite SPA with fragment token handling + existing-user re-auth
findings.codeFileOrFunction: buildInviteUrl uses /accept-invite?token=; frontend/src has no AcceptInvite route

findings.title: Forgot-password / self-service reset link flow missing
findings.codeEvidence: LoginPage sets support message only; no PasswordResetToken
findings.impact: Users depend on admin direct password set — amplifies UR-P5-PW-03
findings.reproduction: Click forgot password on LoginPage
findings.recommendation: Implement tokenized self-service reset per target policy
findings.codeFileOrFunction: LoginPage sets support message only; no PasswordResetToken

findings.title: Leaver does not reassign tasks bookings documents or revoke open invites automatically
findings.codeEvidence: removeOrgUser only updates membership status; no invite scan; no ownership transfer service
findings.impact: Operational orphans and lingering invite tokens after exit
findings.reproduction: Code inspection of removeOrgUser and invite revoke coupling
findings.recommendation: Deprovisioning checklist: invites sessions ownership transfer
findings.codeFileOrFunction: removeOrgUser only updates membership status; no invite scan; no ownership transfer service

findings.title: MFA TOTP/WebAuthn/recovery codes not implemented; UI placeholders only
findings.codeEvidence: AccountSessionsSection placeholders; security flags hardcoded false
findings.impact: Password-only assurance for all privileged IAM actions
findings.reproduction: GET /account/me security object
findings.recommendation: Implement MFA; hide placeholders until available
findings.codeFileOrFunction: AccountSessionsSection placeholders; security flags hardcoded false

findings.title: IAM audits are fire-and-forget (void record); mutations commit even if audit fails
findings.codeEvidence: AuditService intentionally swallows errors; callers void this.userAudit.record / void this.audit.record after prisma commits
findings.dataEvidence: Phase4 iamAuditActionsAllTime={}; password UPDATE events=89 without matching auditAction rows
findings.impact: Security-relevant IAM changes can leave no durable evidence; governance and forensics unreliable
findings.reproduction: Inspect AuditService.record catch; grep void this.userAudit.record in users/invite/role modules
findings.recommendation: Target architecture: mutation + audit outbox same DB transaction; immutable worker; retry+DLQ — do not implement in this audit phase
findings.vpsDataEvidence: Phase4 iamAuditActionsAllTime={}; password UPDATE events=89 without matching auditAction rows
findings.codeFileOrFunction: AuditService intentionally swallows errors; callers void this.userAudit.record / void this.audit.record after prisma commits

findings.title: Audit writes are not in the same DB transaction as IAM mutations
findings.codeEvidence: acceptInvite/removeOrgUser/changeOrgUserPassword complete domain write then void audit via separate prisma.activityLog.create
findings.impact: No atomicity between access change and evidence
findings.reproduction: Read invite accept transaction vs subsequent userAudit.record
findings.recommendation: Transactional outbox row inserted with membership/user update
findings.codeFileOrFunction: acceptInvite/removeOrgUser/changeOrgUserPassword complete domain write then void audit via separate prisma.activityLog.create

findings.title: No audit outbox, retry worker, or dead-letter queue
findings.codeEvidence: No AuditOutbox model; AuditService only logger.error on failure
findings.impact: Dropped audits are not recoverable
findings.reproduction: Schema search outbox; AuditService catch block
findings.recommendation: Implement outbox+worker+DLQ per documented target architecture
findings.codeFileOrFunction: No AuditOutbox model; AuditService only logger.error on failure

findings.title: Refresh-token reuse detection is not written to ActivityLog
findings.codeEvidence: refresh-token.service.ts logs Logger.warn and revokeFamily; no audit.record
findings.impact: Credential-theft signal missing from revision-safe store
findings.reproduction: Read reuse branch in RefreshTokenService.rotate
findings.recommendation: CRITICAL ActivityLog on reuse with family id alias; alert
findings.codeFileOrFunction: refresh-token.service.ts logs Logger.warn and revokeFamily; no audit.record

findings.title: Master-admin password reset has no UserAccessAudit / ActivityLog record
findings.codeEvidence: users.service changePasswordAdmin updates hash without userAudit; org path has USER_PASSWORD_RESET_BY_ADMIN
findings.impact: Highest-privilege credential change can be invisible in IAM audit codes
findings.reproduction: Read changePasswordAdmin vs changeOrgUserPassword
findings.recommendation: Mandatory CRITICAL audit + session revoke + notify
findings.codeFileOrFunction: users.service changePasswordAdmin updates hash without userAudit; org path has USER_PASSWORD_RESET_BY_ADMIN

findings.title: Activity logs are not append-only; deletable via retention and platform prune; no hash-chain
findings.codeEvidence: DataRetentionScheduler can delete activity_logs; platform-admin.service deleteMany activityLog; no hash fields/triggers
findings.dataEvidence: RETENTION_ACTIVITY_LOGS_DAYS default 0 (keep) but delete path exists when configured; prune wipes all
findings.impact: Evidence can be destroyed; org admins cannot API-update logs but platform/DB can erase history
findings.reproduction: Read retention.config activityLogs + platform prune + ActivityLog model
findings.recommendation: WORM/immutable store or hash-chain; separate security log; restrict prune; legal hold
findings.vpsDataEvidence: RETENTION_ACTIVITY_LOGS_DAYS default 0 (keep) but delete path exists when configured; prune wipes all
findings.codeFileOrFunction: DataRetentionScheduler can delete activity_logs; platform-admin.service deleteMany activityLog; no hash fields/triggers

findings.title: AuditService bypasses ActivityLogService PII scrubbing; invite/user audits may embed emails
findings.codeEvidence: ActivityLogService.log scrubs description/metaJson; AuditService.prisma.activityLog.create raw; invite descriptions include email
findings.impact: Data minimization failure in the primary IAM evidence path
findings.reproduction: Compare ActivityLogService.log vs AuditService.record
findings.recommendation: Route all writes through scrubbing; store subject aliases not emails in descriptions
findings.codeFileOrFunction: ActivityLogService.log scrubs description/metaJson; AuditService.prisma.activityLog.create raw; invite descriptions include email

findings.title: IP/UA in activity_logs have default retention disabled (keep forever); lastLoginIp unbounded

findings.impact: Technical PII likely retained longer than necessary without configured policy
findings.reproduction: Read retention.config.ts defaults
findings.recommendation: Organizational policy then finite TTL; separate security retention; scrub on erase
findings.codeFileOrFunction: RETENTION_ACTIVITY_LOGS_DAYS default 0; User.lastLoginIp no TTL job
